title: astragalus mazama
intro: Astragalus mazama, also known as the Mazama's milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the western United States and Canada. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Astragalus mazama include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system against infections and diseases. Herbal preparations of Astragalus mazama often include dried roots and leaves, which can be infused in tea, made into capsules, or added to tinctures and other supplements.
